title: AI Engineer

company_hook.phrase: BlackLine provides cloud software that automates and controls accounting

citation.supported_claim: BlackLine provides cloud software that automates and controls accounting

body_paragraphs.text: My background aligns well with this opportunity. One documented example from my background is the following: Cross-functional collaboration with product and engineering teams. This experience aligns well with the collaborative nature of the AI Engineer role at BlackLine.
body_paragraphs.reason: My background in translating requirements into deployable AI features demonstrates my ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams.

closing_sentence: Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to contribute to BlackLine's mission.
